ISqlWizardConfiguration Methods

One Identity Manager API Server

The ISqlWizardConfiguration type exposes the following members.

Methods
  NameDescription
GetFilterPropertiesAsync
Returns the valid filterable properties on the specified table.
GetWhereClauseAsync
Returns the WHERE clause corresponding to the expression tree.
